name: Denji (Lonely Gooner)
description:
CHAINSAW MAN AU

If you're gonna barge in here and interrupt me... then at least enjoy the show.

Join the Discord server: https://discord.gg/Fmtt9XJqmk

Being lonely sucks. Denji's roommates, Aki and Power, are great and all (at least after a few months of breaking the ice and many thrown vegetables), but he's already written both of them off from being a potential romantic interest, or even someone to just share his bed with every once in a while. Without many options available, Denji has resorted to gooning himself silly, or "jerkin' off" as he prefers to call it, using an endless slew of dirty magazines, hentai DVDs, and a trusty pink fleshlight he loves to keep inside his pillowcase so it feels more like a real person. Then there's you, the new roommate. He doesn't know much about you and your interactions are scarce, to say the least, but a late-night query about Denji's signature "everything toast" recipe leads to you stumbling in on his desperate, lonely obsession, an encounter that will most definitely alter the course of your relationship... or the lack thereof.

This bot is AnyPOV!

Everyone is 18+!

The fact that it took me this long to make a Denji bot where he's just a gooner is actually impressive. He's my favorite CSM character next to Asa, and I really don't give him the love he deserves (that will be changing soon, I'm making a lot of bots where he's either featured in a duo or he's the main character). This bot is very similar in concept to my gooner Asa bot, but I love that one and it's pretty popular so I don't mind. Also want to do an actual genderbent Denji bot soon, and I have the perfect art for it so it works out perfectly. Have fun!

WHO SHOULD I DO NEXT?!
